observation: I can see the residence selection page with Indonesia already selected as indicated by the input field showing '🇮🇩 Indonesia'. Since Indonesia is already properly selected (as shown in the input field and confirmed by the selected state in element 183), I should proceed by clicking the Next button to continue with the sign-up flow.

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: The screen successfully transitioned from a residence selection page to a sign-up page. The BEFORE screen showed 'Select your residence' with Indonesia selected and a Next button, while the AFTER screen displays 'Join 3M+ global traders' with multiple sign-up options (Google, Facebook, Apple) and an email input field.
